examples: All options should begin with a "-" (hyphen).
Each byte in a MAC address is separated by either a colon (:) or a hyphen (-).
O "Long run" (without a hyphen) is a noun. "Long-run" (with a hyphen) is an adjective.
The addition of a hyphen to her surname for the purposes of her title was required under peerage rules, she confirmed.
Is that the reason they took the hyphen out of Wal-Mart and replaced it with a big single star years after Sam died.
